emails.subject: Mayoral Race
emails.body: Mayoral Race Steve: If I can get you current polling data that indicate vulnerability on the part of Brown, would the PAC reconsider providing support? Jim

emails.subject: RE: Mayoral Race
emails.body: RE: Mayoral Race We can always reconsider in the sense of providing support to someone else, but the money to Brown is out the door. I would still like to see the data. To: Kean, Steven J.

emails.subject: RE: Mayoral Race
emails.body: RE: Mayoral Race I am not concerned with the Brown money. My focus is on possibly dislodging money for Orlando. I will try and arrange to sit down and look at theMost recent numbers. They will be getting new results over the weekend and it should be indicative of trends. Jim A. Hughes Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
